Home.hero_title: Your digital presence doesn't just lack design. It lacks a clear form.
Home.hero_subtitle: GRIFZ reveals the visual matter of a brand and transforms it into a coherent digital presence.
Home.hero_audience: Visual identity, website, advertising visuals and brand system for SMEs, shops, restaurants, local brands, artists and young companies.
Home.problem_text: Isolated logo, unclear site, inconsistent networks, improvised visuals: many companies already exist, but their digital presence doesn't inspire trust yet.
Home.solution_text: GRIFZ starts from your activity, your universe and your visual matter to build a clear direction: identity, website, content, campaigns and graphic system.
Home.offer_prescan_desc: Free first look at your digital presence.
Home.offer_scan_desc: Audit + Campaign, Identity or System projections.
Home.offer_identity_desc: Complete visual identity: logo, colors, typography, art direction.
Home.offer_system_desc: Complete digital ecosystem: identity, website, design system, campaign and documentation.
Home.method_observe_desc: We analyze your current image: website, networks, logo, assets and coherence.
Home.method_reveal_desc: We identify the material, tone and visual direction that can carry your brand.
Home.method_build_desc: We create the necessary elements: identity, website, visuals, videos or complete system.
Home.method_deploy_desc: We deliver usable assets: files, templates, exports, guidelines and recommendations.
Home.final_subtitle: The Pre-Scan allows you to quickly identify the first tracks. The Scan then helps visualize what your brand could become.

Catalogue.title: Materials Catalog
Catalogue.subtitle: Discover our essences through different collections. Click on the center cards to reveal their palettes.

About.title: The Studio.
About.intro: We are an independent design studio. We believe every brand possesses a fundamental material that dictates its rhythm, typography, interaction and credibility.
About.block1_text: We are not a website factory. We carefully select our projects (5 to 10 per month maximum) to guarantee total involvement and artisanal quality on every creation.
About.block2_text: We don't stop at web design. From visual identity to overall art direction, we sculpt your digital presence in a coherent, premium and lasting way.
About.block3_text: Our method always begins with selecting your material. Is it Glass, clinical and pure? Copper, warm and textured? Charcoal, raw and powerful? This choice dictates all our design decisions. Furthermore, we guarantee strict confidentiality on projects undergoing redesign.
About.teaser_text_1: A manifesto object from the GRIFZ universe.

Reservation.title: Book your GRIFZ call
Reservation.subtitle: In 30 minutes, we identify what blocks your digital presence, which visual direction could suit you and which offer is the most adapted: Scan, Campaign, Identity or System.
Reservation.extra_phrase: Not sure which offer to choose? The Scan is designed precisely to determine it.
Reservation.no_slots: No time slots available for this date.
Reservation.offers_subtitle: Matter is the concept. Offers are the product. Pre-Scan is the gateway.
Reservation.pack1_desc: First look at your digital presence. We identify 2 to 3 visible points that may weaken your image and suggest a first track for improvement.
Reservation.pack2_desc:
Visual audit + concrete projections to visualize what your brand could become.
• Scan Light — audit + 1 projection.
• Scan Plus — audit + projections Campaign, Identity and System.
Reservation.pack3_desc: Creation of ready-to-publish advertising visuals and videos to launch, test or reinforce an offer. Includes social formats, ad variations and mini art direction.
Reservation.pack4_desc: Visual identity redesign: logo system, colors, typography, art direction, templates and brand book.
Reservation.pack5_desc: Complete digital ecosystem: identity, website or mockups, design system, campaign, documentation and support.

Contact.title: Contact.
Contact.intro: Let's start the conversation. Tell us about your brand, your ambitions, and the material you wish to sculpt.
Contact.placeholder_message: Briefly describe your project or challenge...

Realisations.title: Works & visions
Realisations.subtitle: Our works show how GRIFZ structures a digital presence: identity, website, visuals, campaigns and brand systems. Some visions are fictional concepts, used to demonstrate our projection capabilities.
Realisations.fictional_disclaimer: Concept not affiliated, not commissioned, and not endorsed by the cited brand.
Realisations.fictional_demonstrates: Ability to imagine how a material logic could transform a known identity, without commercial affiliation.
Realisations.cta_separator_text: Want to see what your brand could become?
Realisations.vision_text: The visual approach for {title} is based on an in-depth study of their identity. We defined an art direction around the material {material} to capture the essence of their ambition. Every detail, from textures to typography, was designed to elevate the experience.
Realisations.conceptual_note: * Internal conceptual exploration by GRIFZ Studio.
